name: CSV Spreadsheet
description: Edit CSV files with a spreadsheet interface and formula support
author: Nimbalyst

marketplace.changelog:
1.0.2: See collaborator presence in shared spreadsheets, share selected cells with AI, and reopen shared documents more reliably.
1.0.1: Collaborative editing support, currency/percent/number cell formatting, and full ISO date rendering.
marketplace.tagline: Visual CSV editing with formulas and column formatting
marketplace.longDescription: Open CSV and TSV files in a full spreadsheet interface with formula support, column resizing, frozen rows/columns, and sortable headers. Edit data visually while the underlying CSV stays clean and git-friendly. Toggle to source mode to see and edit the raw text.
highlights: Spreadsheet UI for CSV and TSV files
Frozen rows and columns, sortable headers
Source mode toggle for raw CSV editing

screenshots.alt: CSV spreadsheet editor with revenue data

enumDescriptions: Store metadata as a comment in the CSV file (default)
Store metadata in a separate .csvmeta file
metadataStorage.description: Where to store spreadsheet metadata (headers, frozen columns, formatting)
